creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
The following files have mode 445 which makes no sense:

www/mozilla/files/Attic/patch-sparc64,v
www/mozilla-devel/files/Attic/patch-sparc64,v
www/mozilla-devel/files/Attic/patch-xptcall-sparc64,v
www/seamonkey/files/Attic/patch-sparc64,v
www/xulrunner/files/Attic/patch-xptcall-sparc64,v
www/seamonkey2/files/Attic/patch-sparc64,v

I've check with cperciva and portsnap should pick up the fixes without a forced commit assuming cvs does.
